_comment: Hero banner illustrations for the /website/service-details/ pages on the personal portfolio site. Uses Recraft V3's dedicated 'digital_illustration' style for reliable flat-vector output (flux-dev kept drifting into glossy 3D renders and hallucinated garbled text on signage). Palette matches the site's brand pink (#bd1550) plus dark navy/charcoal and white. Run: poetry run python assetgen/generate.py assetgen/manifests/service-heroes.json

input.negative_prompt: text, words, letters, numbers, typography, labels, captions, infographic, poster, dashboard, UI mockup, multiple panels

defaults.prompt_prefix: A single unified flat vector icon illustration (not an infographic, not a poster, not a UI dashboard, no separate colored panels), wide banner composition, clean modern tech/business style, bold simple shapes, generous white negative space, color palette of magenta-pink, dark navy and light grey accents on a white background
defaults.prompt_suffix: no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no signage, no captions, no human faces or figures, crisp clean vector look

assets.name: service-5-technical-leadership
assets.prompt: a pyramid-shaped constellation of glowing interconnected orbs, one large orb at the apex glowing bright pink, thin connecting lines between the orbs, abstract and minimal

assets.name: service-6-rapid-mvp
assets.prompt: a stylized rocket ship launching upward off an open laptop, small speed lines and a dotted arc trajectory, conveying a fast product launch

assets.name: service-4-business-growth
assets.prompt: a single bold upward arrow made of ascending geometric steps/blocks, rising toward a glowing pink five-point star, minimal and abstract, conveying growth

assets.name: service-1-backend-engineering
assets.prompt: a stack of server racks beside a large gear/cog containing a code bracket symbol, geometric and orderly, conveying backend APIs and infrastructure

assets.name: service-3-ai-llm-engineering
assets.prompt: a single brain-shaped icon made of glowing interconnected circuit nodes, with one small speech-bubble shape emerging from the top, unified flat icon design

assets.name: service-7-engineering-mentorship
assets.prompt: two overlapping speech-bubble shapes stacked together with a small lightbulb shape inside one of them, single unified flat icon, conveying mentorship and guidance
